name: Lightbulb
short_description: Lightbulb is a clicker game where you click the buttons to turn the light on or off, while all the other players are clicking too. A game where every choice shapes the world. Join the battle between light and darkness and witness the impact of your actions in real time!
detailed_description:
In a world where darkness and light wage an eternal battle, LightBulb puts the power in your hands. Press the button and become the guardian of light or the herald of darkness, shaping the fate of an entire universe. Each click, whether to turn on or off, can shift the balance—bringing hope or plunging everything into deep shadows. But beware: light reveals secrets that darkness conceals, and darkness hides dangers that light dares not face. Embark on this journey of crucial choices, where every action echoes in an endless cycle. Prepare yourself—the power to illuminate or consume is in your hands... But what will you choose?

Features:

  • Lightbulb is a clicker game where you click the buttons to turn the light on or off, while all the other players are clicking too.

  • A game where every choice shapes the world. Join the battle between light and darkness and witness the impact of your actions in real time!

  • Day/night cycle based on the real time.

  • Lots of achievements to unlock! Will you be able to unlock them all?

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Brazil
